hero.introduction: I build modern web applications focused on performance and usability. I turn ideas into fast, accessible interfaces.

about.summary: I design and build web applications with an emphasis on clean code, reusability and performance.
about.longDescription: I specialize in creating scalable web applications using modern frameworks and best practices. I enjoy solving problems and shipping polished user experiences.

project6.description: Web application designed for retail stores to calculate and distribute daily sales targets to advisors, facilitating KPI tracking.

project10.description: Optimized landing page created to attract customers and showcase tourism adventure services. Built focusing on speed and conversion.

item1.description: Focused on software development, database management, and systems architecture.

item2.description: Intensive program covering frontend and backend technologies.

item1.description:
• Implemented a CRM for managing photographic content using Supabase (PostgreSQL), centralizing data administration and improving traceability.
• Designed an administrative management system in SQL Server under 3FN normalization, improving financial and organizational control.
• Developed a sales and ticket registration system with React and Supabase, automating Excel-based processes and reducing operational time and errors.
• Implemented ETL processes from Excel to databases using SQL and Power Query, automating data loading, cleaning and transformation.
• Built administrative dashboards integrating database and Excel data, improving visibility and analysis for decision making.
• Integrated APIs for data synchronization, automating flows and improving information consistency.

item2.position: Full Stack Developer / Oracle APEX Developer
item2.description:
• Built a responsive digital wallet landing page using Excalidraw, Figma, HTML, and CSS, improving navigation clarity and product presentation.
• Improved Oracle APEX interfaces using HTML, CSS, and functional enhancements.
• Implemented PL/SQL validations and automations in Oracle Database.
• Built an ETL module for bulk Excel imports, reducing manual workload.

item3.description:
• Built the administrative frontend using React and Vite, converting complex internal processes into clearer workflows for non-technical staff.
• Designed and developed the institution’s landing page using responsive layouts and accessible content structures.
• Implemented a frontend architecture based on Atomic Design and reusable components.
• Developed data-fetching and validation flows using TanStack Query, Axios, and Zod.
• Integrated frontend workflows with C# .NET and MySQL services under layered architecture and Repository patterns.
• Automated end-to-end testing with Cypress for critical workflows.
